embed.title: !script
embed.description: Export your current tracking as a list of commands you could paste back in. Useful as a personal backup before making big changes, or for migrating between installs.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value: `{{prefix}}script` — returns your tracking as a text file attachment (or inline text on Telegram)

fields.name: Tip
fields.value: The output covers every tracking type — pokemon, raid, egg, quest, invasion, lure, nest, gym, fort, maxbattle — for your currently-active profile only. Switch profile first (`{{prefix}}profile switch <name>`) to export a different profile.
